Public synthetic posture evidence is treated as evidence, not blanket authorization.
The exact proposed effect is canonicalized and digest-bound.
Nonce, action_digest, policy_digest, TTL, destination, and scope are checked.
The effect is accepted, held, or denied before impact.

fixtures.title: Scope Mismatch — FAIL

checks.label: Action digest binding

checks.label: Freshness and replay

checks.detail: Effect type, destination, operation, policy digest, and epoch are checked before acceptance.
checks.label: Policy and scope
